title: elymus longearistatus
intro: Elymus longearistatus, also known as Elymus mollis, is a type of grass species that belongs to the wheat grass family. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its various health benefits and medicinal properties. Its roots and leaves are said to possess anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which can help to soothe digestive issues, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory problems. Herbal preparations of Elymus longearistatus include infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be used to treat a range of health issues, including digestive problems, fever, and respiratory infections.
